AntiCheat v2.0.0

Advanced anti-cheat system built for FiveM servers. Version 2.0.0 delivers enhanced detection accuracy, optimized performance, and rock-solid security to protect your game environment.

Real-time Protection

Core Features

Providing comprehensive, multi-layered anti-cheat protection for FiveM servers.

AI Behavior Analysis

Machine-learning driven real-time player behavior analysis to accurately identify anomalies and cheating patterns.

v2.0.0 Enhanced

Memory Integrity Protection

Deep game memory scanning to detect and block injections, hooks, and other common attack vectors.

Kernel-Level

Real-Time Monitoring

Intuitive web dashboard providing live server security status and detailed violation event logs.

Visualized

Ultra-Low Overhead

Highly optimized detection engine with an average latency under 5ms, ensuring a smooth gameplay experience.

Efficient

Auto-Updating

Cloud-based signature library syncs in real-time to rapidly counter new cheat tools without manual intervention.

Smart

Detailed Audit Logs

Complete cheat detection records with evidence chains, supporting export and analysis for compliance.

Compliant

v2.0.0 Highlights

This update focuses on a comprehensive leap in security, performance, and stability.

+35% Accuracy

AI model upgrade reduces false positives by 62%

+40% Performance

Optimized resource usage supports larger server loads

Hardened Security

New memory anti-injection and anti-debugging protections

Brand New Dashboard

Real-time monitoring with visualized analytics

Cloud Sync

Threat signature database updates instantly

Enhanced Compatibility

Supports latest FiveM builds and plugin ecosystems

Security Status

Real-time protection module status overview.

AI Behavior Detection

Active · Analyzing 1,247 player behaviors

Memory Integrity

Secure · No abnormal injections detected

Network Traffic

Normal · Packet validation rate 99.8%

Cloud Signature Library

Synchronized · Latest threat database (2026-07-12)

Audit Logs

Recording · 23 security events processed today
